title: narration 段缺 characters_in_segment 应被拒

segments.novel_text: 清晨的雾气尚未散去，叶尘已经在练武场上挥剑一个时辰。

image_prompt.scene: Misty morning at a martial arts training ground with ancient stone tiles a lone young swordsman practicing sword forms under a willow tree fog swirling around practice dummies

video_prompt.action: The young swordsman executes a slow deliberate sword kata blade cutting through mist
video_prompt.ambiance_audio: Distant birdsong wind through willow branches
